evals.prompt: 我有个新的产品想法，想和 AI 聊完之后沉淀成规范的产品笔记，不确定应该写成什么文档。
evals.expected_output: The agent should trigger product-notes, classify the input before writing, ask focused questions if the product workspace or idea is unclear, and propose the product notes structure rather than defaulting to a generic PRD.
expectations: Triggered the product-notes skill
Classified the input before choosing a document type
Did not default to a generic PRD
Asked at most three focused clarification questions or drafted with explicit open questions

evals.prompt: Weave 的产品定位变了，我觉得它不是普通写作工具，而是 local-first writing agent。帮我沉淀一下。
evals.expected_output: The agent should treat this as a positioning update and likely decision record, update or propose current positioning, preserve assumptions and non-goals, and note whether any older process notes should be marked superseded.
expectations: Classified the request as a positioning note update
Considered whether a decision record is also needed
Separated facts, judgments, and assumptions
Preserved current consensus separately from historical process notes

evals.prompt: 下个版本我想先做模型接入、多轮对话和本地会话保存，不做 memory 和完整 workflow。写个迭代文档。
evals.expected_output: The agent should create an iteration spec with goal, background, product hypotheses, scope, non-goals, user flow or requirements, acceptance criteria, risks, open questions, and relationship to future iterations.
expectations: Classified the request as an iteration spec
Included scope and non-goals
Included product hypotheses or what the iteration validates
Included acceptance criteria
Avoided expanding scope into memory or full workflow

evals.prompt: 记录一下这个取舍：当前不引入 LangChain，先用自己的轻量 model adapter。
evals.expected_output: The agent should classify this as a decision record, write an ADR-style note with context, options, decision, rationale, rejected work, consequences, and revisit trigger.
expectations: Classified the request as a decision record
Used an ADR-style structure
Included rejected alternatives or what is not being done
Included consequences or revisit trigger

evals.prompt: 用户反馈说打开产品后不知道从哪里开始写，我只是想先记下来，不一定马上变成需求。
evals.expected_output: The agent should classify this as an insight note, preserve the observation separately from product interpretation, include hypotheses to validate, and avoid prematurely turning it into an iteration spec unless requested.
expectations: Classified the request as an insight note
Separated observation from product interpretation
Included hypotheses to validate
Did not prematurely convert the feedback into a full iteration spec

evals.prompt: 以后 Weave 的产品笔记都放在 /Users/deweyou/Library/Mobile Documents/iCloud~md~obsidian/Documents/Dewey Ou/作品/Weave，不要新建 product 目录。帮我把这个目录规范也沉淀进文档体系。
evals.expected_output: The agent should treat the provided path as the product notes root, keep note paths relative to that root, update or propose the doc-system/index convention there, and avoid creating a separate top-level product/ directory.
expectations: Resolved the explicit path as the product notes root
Kept product note locations relative to the custom root
Updated or proposed a workspace convention document such as doc-system or 文档体系
Did not create or suggest a separate default product/ directory

evals.prompt: 我有三个产品，想用 docs/products/<name>/ 分别沉淀，每个产品里面再有 iterations、decisions、insights。这个 product notes 怎么处理？
evals.expected_output: The agent should support docs/products/<name>/ as a custom multi-product root convention, explain that each product gets its own root, and route future notes under the chosen product root after asking which product if ambiguous.
expectations: Supported a custom multi-product directory convention
Explained that each product has its own product notes root
Planned to ask which product to use when the target product is ambiguous
Kept the standard note-type directories under each custom product root

evals.prompt: 以后都记住：我的产品笔记放在 docs/products/weave，之后不要每次问我路径。
evals.expected_output: The agent should explain that path memory must be persisted in a readable convention file, update or propose AGENTS.md, .agents/product-notes.md, docs/products/index.md, or the product root index with a Product Notes Location block, and use that stored convention on future runs.
expectations: Explained that long-term path memory comes from persisted convention files, not model memory
Planned to write or update a durable convention file
Included the product notes root and relative note-type paths in the persisted convention
Committed to reading the persisted convention before asking for the path in future runs

evals.prompt: 我想沉淀一个新产品想法，但我没说目录，当前仓库里也没有明显的 product notes 结构。
evals.expected_output: The agent should not hardcode or invent a product notes root. It should ask the user where product notes should live before writing files, or offer a small set of possible conventions without creating anything.
expectations: Did not hardcode any user-specific absolute path from the skill itself
Did not silently create a default product/ directory
Asked the user where product notes should live when no root could be resolved
Offered possible directory conventions only as choices or recommendations
